recommendations.title: Thru the Mirror
recommendations.overview: Mickey has been reading Alice in Wonderland, and falls asleep. He finds himself on the other side of the mirror, where the furniture is alive.

recommendations.title: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
recommendations.overview: A beautiful girl, Snow White, takes refuge in the forest in the house of seven dwarfs to hide from her stepmother, the wicked Queen. The Queen is jealous because she wants to be known as "the fairest in the land," and Snow White's beauty surpasses he
recommendations.director: William Cottrell, Perce Pearce, Wilfred Jackson, Larry Morey, Ben Sharpsteen, David Hand

recommendations.title: Fantasia
recommendations.overview: Walt Disney's timeless masterpiece is an extravaganza of sight and sound! See the music come to life, hear the pictures burst into song and experience the excitement that is Fantasia over and over again.
recommendations.director: Jim Handley, James Algar, Norman Ferguson, Bill Roberts, Ben Sharpsteen, David Hand, Paul Satterfield, Wilfred Jackson, Ford Beebe Jr., Hamilton Luske, T. Hee, Samuel Armstrong

recommendations.title: Mickey's Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: Ebenezer Scrooge is far too greedy to understand that Christmas is a time for kindness and generosity. But with the guidance of some new found friends, Scrooge learns to embrace the spirit of the season. A retelling of the classic Dickens tale with D

recommendations.title: The Cat Returns
recommendations.overview: Young Haru rescues a cat from being run over, but soon learns it's no ordinary feline; it happens to be the Prince of the Cats.

recommendations.title: Whisper of the Heart
recommendations.overview: Shizuku lives a simple life, dominated by her love for stories and writing. One day she notices that all the library books she has have been previously checked out by the same person: "Seiji Amasawa."

recommendations.title: Barbie as the Island Princess
recommendations.overview: Young Rosella is saved by a few kind animals after a shipwreck. Now called Ro, she learns to talk to animals. One day, she saves the life of a prince and returns to civilisation to discover her past.

recommendations.title: The Little Prince

recommendations.title: Mavka: The Forest Song
recommendations.overview: Mavka, a Soul of the Forest, faces an impossible choice between love and her duty as Guardian of the Heart of the Forest when she falls for a human, a talented young musician named Lukas.

recommendations.title: My Life as a Zucchini
recommendations.overview: After his mother’s death, Zucchini is befriended by a kind police officer, Raymond, who accompanies him to his new foster home filled with other orphans his age. There, with the help of his newfound friends, Zucchini eventually learns to trust and lo
